name: academorix/laravel-nightwatch
purpose: Laravel Nightwatch production monitoring with attribute-driven context, filter, redactor, and sampler discovery.
capabilities: Nightwatch facade wrapping the context registry
when_to_use: Enriching production observability with tenant / user / feature-flag context, filters, or dynamic sampling.
when_not_to_use: For error tracking specifically, use academorix/laravel-sentry; for dev-time inspection, use academorix/laravel-debugbar.
